payload.reason: GitOps.WorkCommitsForIssue runs git log --all --fixed-strings --grep='(act-<prefix4>' and returns {sha,subject,author_date}. first4Hex extracts the doctor-grep key. Wired into RunShow (best-effort; git failure → empty Commits, not error). Human renderer appends 'commits:' block when non-empty; ShowJSON always emits 'commits' key (empty array when none). Tests cover helper, render with/without, JSON contract, and end-to-end with a real git work commit.
